surfaces.label: Editor Dashboard
surfaces.purpose: Show planned editor-level overview of article inventory, unresolved AG25Z work and pending review states.
surfaces.input_source: AG25Z readiness matrix and unresolved work register

surfaces.label: Browse Articles
surfaces.purpose: Browse existing articles by category, article type, readiness, gap status, reference status, attribution status and layout status.
surfaces.input_source: AG25A inventory and AG25Z unresolved work register

surfaces.label: Create New Article
surfaces.purpose: Plan editor-side new article creation with topic, category, article type, structure, references and object requirements.

surfaces.label: Edit Existing Article
surfaces.purpose: Plan editor-side edit workflow for title, summary, body sections, references, attribution, layout, card and SEO fields.

surfaces.label: Article Structure Editor
surfaces.purpose: Plan section-level editing for headline, introduction, body sections, conclusion, reflection boxes and object anchors.

surfaces.label: Auto-Article Tool Browser
surfaces.purpose: Browse available article preparation tools for images, graphs, tables, infographics, diagrams, references, quotes and layout controls.

surfaces.label: Reference Manager
surfaces.purpose: Expose future manual fields for reference URL, source type, credibility, claim support and editorial verification status.

surfaces.label: Image/Object and Attribution Manager
surfaces.purpose: Expose future manual fields for image/object source, credit, licence note, generated-asset note and editorial verification status.

surfaces.label: Graph, Table and Infographic Manager
surfaces.purpose: Plan editor selection and placement of charts, tables, infographics, diagrams and other article objects.

surfaces.label: SEO/Card/Summary Editor
surfaces.purpose: Plan fields for meta description, card title, summary, category badge and article preview text.
surfaces.input_source: AG25D card and layout audit model

surfaces.label: Article Preview Panel
surfaces.purpose: Plan editor preview of article, card, mobile layout and object placement before submission.

surfaces.label: Submit / Return / Hold Decision Panel
surfaces.purpose: Plan editor decisions such as submit to admin review, return for correction, hold or keep as draft candidate.
